Admin

## Description

The admin object provides information on the Intercom teammate. You can see more about this on the [Admin Model page of our API Reference](https://developers.intercom.com/intercom-api-reference/reference#admin-model).

## Example Object

```json
{
  admin: {
    type: "admin",
    id: "814860",
    name: "IntercomTest",
    email: "theadmin@example.com",
    job_title: "Existentialist",
    away_mode_enabled: false,
    away_mode_reassign: false,
    avatar: {
      image_url: "https://static.site.test.icon"
    },
    team_ids: [
      814865
    ]
  }
}
```
